description: T59 EventCreationOrchestrator MUST use strict null check (capacity === null) for unlimited events — NOT falsy check (capacity == null or !capacity). A capacity of 0 is not the same as unlimited and must be treated as fully booked.
blockConditions: falsy check (!capacity) used for unlimited event detection
capacity === 0 treated as unlimited
capacity == null (loose equality) used instead of strict null check
passConditions: capacity === null check used for unlimited events
capacity === 0 returns fully booked status
strict equality null check only
resolution: capacity === null → unlimited. capacity === 0 → fully booked. Using falsy check (!capacity) = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T59 EventCreationOrchestrator MUST call storeDocument() before enqueue('EventCreated', ...). Event record must exist in xiigen-events before any downstream consumer can process EventCreated.
blockConditions: enqueue('EventCreated') called before storeDocument
EventCreated emitted without prior database record in xiigen-events
passConditions: storeDocument(xiigen-events, event) called before enqueue('EventCreated')
database record exists before downstream consumers receive EventCreated
resolution: storeDocument(xiigen-events, event) at ORDER 1. enqueue('EventCreated') at ORDER 2. Reversed order = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T60 EventRegistrationManager MUST call registerAtomically() as ONE atomic operation — no separate check-then-write pattern. Separate check + write creates a race window allowing double-booking. Duplicate (attendeeId, eventId) must return the existing registration (SETNX semantic).
blockConditions: separate checkExists() then storeDocument() pattern used for registration
two-step registration creates race window allowing double-booking
passConditions: registerAtomically(attendeeId, eventId) called as single atomic operation
duplicate registration returns existing record without error (SETNX semantic)
resolution: registerAtomically(attendeeId, eventId) in one call. Separate checkExists() then storeDocument() = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T60 EventRegistrationManager capacity thresholds and waitlist limits MUST come from FREEDOM config — never hardcoded constants. Hardcoded thresholds make per-tenant capacity tuning impossible.
blockConditions: capacity limit hardcoded as constant in T60
waitlist limit hardcoded instead of read from FREEDOM config
threshold not read from FREEDOM config at runtime
passConditions: freedom.getConfig('event_registration_capacity_limit') drives capacity threshold
all capacity thresholds read from FREEDOM config at runtime

description: T61 EventPromotionEngine MUST run content safety check at ORDER 1 — before storeDocument(), before enqueue('EventPromoted'). Promoting unchecked content bypasses safety controls and cannot be undone by downstream consumers.
blockConditions: contentSafetyCheck() called after storeDocument
EventPromoted enqueued before safety check completes
content safety check absent from promotion path
passConditions: contentSafetyCheck() at ORDER 1
storeDocument() at ORDER 2
enqueue('EventPromoted') at ORDER 3
resolution: contentSafetyCheck() at ORDER 1, storeDocument() at ORDER 2, enqueue('EventPromoted') at ORDER 3. Safety after store = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T62 EventAnalyticsTracker entire handler MUST be wrapped in try/catch — analytics failures must NEVER propagate to the event registration path. Uncaught analytics errors blocking registration = data loss.
blockConditions: analytics error propagates to event registration path
uncaught exception in T62 handler blocks registration processing
T62 handler missing try/catch wrapper
passConditions: entire T62 handler wrapped in try/catch
analytics failure caught and logged without rethrowing
DataProcessResult.success returned even on analytics failure
resolution: Entire T62 handler in try/catch. Analytics error caught and logged. DataProcessResult.success returned even on analytics failure.

description: T59 EventCreationOrchestrator: xiigen-events index is PRIVATE scope. Cross-tenant event reads are forbidden. Tenant context from AsyncLocalStorage only â€” never from event payload.
blockConditions: event record stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored event record
tenantId sourced from request parameter instead of ALS
passConditions: Event records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId — never from request parameter or event payload
All xiigen-events reads include tenantId predicate from ALS

description: T60 EventRegistrationManager: xiigen-event-registrations index is PRIVATE scope. Cross-tenant registration reads are forbidden. Tenant context from AsyncLocalStorage only â€” never from event payload.
blockConditions: registration record stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored registration record
tenantId sourced from request parameter instead of ALS
passConditions: Registration records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId — never from request parameter or event payload
All xiigen-event-registrations reads include tenantId predicate from ALS

description: T61 EventPromotionEngine: xiigen-event-promotions index is PRIVATE scope. Cross-tenant promotion reads are forbidden. Tenant context from AsyncLocalStorage only â€” never from event payload.
blockConditions: promotion record stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored promotion record
tenantId sourced from request parameter instead of ALS
passConditions: Promotion records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId — never from request parameter or event payload
All xiigen-event-promotions reads include tenantId predicate from ALS

blockConditions: analytics record stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored analytics record
tenantId sourced from request parameter instead of ALS
passConditions: Analytics records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId — never from request parameter or event payload
